metadata.synopsis: Discover the true meaning of survival of the fittest as a terrifying creature from the past brings the future to its knees in this Danish-American kaiju creature feature about a cold-blooded 90-foot killer whose time has come... again!
metadata.title: Reptilicus

metadata.synopsis: Jumping with action, suspense and Southern Gothic charm,  this cult-classic stars Ray Milland, Sam Elliott and Joan Van Ark...who are all only a lily pad away from croaking when nature -- led by thousands of murderous frogs -- decides to fight back!
metadata.title: Frogs

metadata.synopsis: In the small town of Fly Creek, the power lines fall onto wet soil after a powerful storm, driving large, bloodthirsty worms to the surface. Inundated by carnivorous creatures, the terrorized locals race to find the cause of the rampage!
metadata.title: Squirm

metadata.synopsis: Colonel West returns from an historic trip to Saturn with a strange ailment: his flesh is melting! And only human flesh and blood will keep him alive!
metadata.title: The Incredible Melting Man

metadata.synopsis: In this sci-fi thriller, Peter Weller leads an exploration team trapped five miles beneath the ocean's surface with a creature that cannot die!
metadata.title: Leviathan

metadata.synopsis: Struggling actress Mary Steenburgen is offered the film role of a lifetime by the mysterious Roddy McDowall. But all is not as it seems and, as the pieces fall into place, her quest for stardom becomes a fight for survival in this twisty thriller.
metadata.title: Dead Of Winter
